title: agallostachys fastuosa
intro: Agallostachys fastuosa, also known as Indian copal or Agalloch, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Agallostachys fastuosa is often prepared as an essential oil or resin for use in herbal remedies, and can be found in traditional Indian medicine, Ayurveda.
